overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt entering a medieval tavern or brothel. The character walks through a candlelit interior with wooden architecture, stained glass windows, and NPCs socializing. Warm artificial lighting creates an intimate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden corridor outside a private chamber

events.description: wooden door opens inward revealing the candlelit interior room
character steps through the doorway threshold into the main chamber

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden door and walking through the doorway into the room

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing watch beside the entrance door

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs that opens inward into the room
red fabric wall hanging beside the door
dark wooden paneled walls of the corridor
wall-mounted candle sconces providing warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow wooden corridor facing a heavy door. An armored guard stands to the right. The door opens to reveal a warm interior, and the character steps through the threshold into the main chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with social gathering

agents.ego_description: walking through the room observing NPCs and the interior details, moving past various groups of people

notable_agents.action: woman in revealing clothing dancing near the center table
couple embracing near the stained glass windows

entered.detail: tall ornate stained glass windows with circular geometric patterns
tall dark wooden bookshelves filled with books against the back wall
wooden table with multiple lit candles and scattered papers
row of decorative ceramic plates mounted high on the wall
red carpet runner on the wooden floor
upholstered wooden chairs arranged around the room

segments.scene_description: The character explores a spacious candlelit room with ornate stained glass windows on the left and tall bookshelves on the right. Several NPCs are scattered throughout - some dancing, some embracing, others sitting on wooden furniture. The warm candlelight illuminates decorative wall plates and red floor rugs as the character moves through the social space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined wooden passageway into a sprawling, candlelit social hall. It begins in a narrow corridor facing a heavy door guarded by an armored soldier, moving forward as the door swings open to reveal a warm interior. As the character steps across the threshold, the space expands into a spacious chamber where the dim light of the hallway gives way to the glow of flickering candles and ornate stained glass. The camera then glides through the room, passing tall bookshelves and decorative wall plates while weaving between dancing and embracing NPCs. The scene finally opens up across red floor rugs and wooden furniture, fully immersing the viewer in the intimate atmosphere of the bustling hall.
